project.title: Screening of proteins related to mouse KIF3A protein by LC-MS.
project.projectDescription: Screening of proteins related to mouse KIF3A protein by LC-MS.
project.sampleProcessingProtocol: Co-IP) was followed to the Dynabeads Protein G kit,eluation buffer was added to elute the bead-antibody-antigen complex, and the sample was used for liquid chromatography mass spectrometry (LC-MS) or subsequent detection.
project.dataProcessingProtocol: raw MS data was converted into MS peak file, then the mascot software was used to search and match the species sequences in the database, and the search results were filtered and quality controlled to give reliable protein identification results.raw MS data was converted into MS peak file, then the mascot software was used to search and match the species sequences in the database, and the search results were filtered and quality controlled to give reliable protein identification results.
